Serving Killarney, Manitoba

Roofing in Killarney, Manitoba

Metal roofs, shingle re-roofs, repairs and storm claims for Killarney and the surrounding area — from a third-generation, fully insured crew based in nearby Brandon.

Home/Roofing in Killarney

Killarney & area

Your Killarney Roofers

Killarney is part of the Westman region we’ve served for over 60 years. Same crew, same standard, whether you’re in town or out on an acreage.

Metal is our lead product — built for prairie wind and snow — but we do it all: shingle re-roofs, repairs, siding and eavestrough, plus honest help through a storm or hail claim. Free quotes, and a straight answer either way.

  • Metal roofing — standing seam & metal shingles
  • Shingle roofs & re-roofs
  • Roof repair and hail / insurance claims
  • Siding, eavestrough & soffit

Free quotes

Roofing in Killarney? Let's Talk.

Free quotes for Killarney and the surrounding Westman area. No pressure, and a straight answer on what your roof needs.
